global_description: Tool with a long wooden or metal handle and a heavy metal head, typically used for driving nails. The head is often dual-sided, with one flat surface for striking and a claw on the opposite side for pulling nails.

part_details.handle: Long, cylindrical, made of wood or metal, smooth texture
part_details.head: Heavy, metallic, dual-sided with flat and claw surfaces

spatial_relations: Head attached to top of handle
Striking surface on one side of head
